ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was collected */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the sensor location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the sensor location */,
  "acceleration" REAL /* Acceleration measured by the sensor */,
  "light_intensity" REAL /* Light intensity measured by the sensor */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature measured by the sensor */,
  "sound_level" REAL /* Sound level measured by the sensor */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., 'good', 'suspected', 'invalid') */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level of the sensor at the time of data collection */,
  "signal_strength" REAL /* Signal strength of the sensor at the time of data collection */,
  "raw_data" TEXT /* Raw data collected by the sensor in binary format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor type */,
  "installation_location" TEXT /* Location where the sensor is installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., 'active', 'inactive', 'maintenance') */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Maintenance schedule for the sensor (e.g., 'monthly', 'quarterly') */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Version of the sensor's firmware */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was last calibrated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_installation_location FOREIGN KEY ("installation_location") REFERENCES locations ("location_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_sensor_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_type_id") REFERENCES sensor_types ("sensor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters that the sensor can measure (e.g., 'acceleration, light, temperature, sound') */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor's parameters (e.g., 'm/s^2', 'lux', '°C', 'dB') */,
  "measurement_range" TEXT /* Measurement range of the sensor (e.g., '0-100 m/s^2', '0-1000 lux', '0-100 °C', '0-100 dB') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., 'industrial', 'urban', 'rural') */,
  "gps_coordinates" TEXT /* GPS coordinates of the location (e.g., 'lat, lon') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., 'administrator', 'analyst', 'engineer') */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., 'view', 'download') */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access (e.g., 'success', 'failure') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point with the issue */,
  "issue_type" TEXT /* Type of the data quality issue (e.g., 'outlier', 'missing', 'inconsistent') */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the issue */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Resolution status of the issue (e.g., 'open', 'resolved', 'ignored') */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* User who reported the issue */,
  "reported_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was reported */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., 'calibration', 'repair', 'replacement') */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the maintenance activity */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* User who performed the maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., 'completed', 'scheduled', 'canceled') */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is scheduled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., 'data quality', 'sensor failure') */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., 'critical', 'warning', 'info') */,
  "reported_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was reported */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)
